5
Brand Signature Ingredient
5-ALA
5-Aminolevulinic Acid (5-ALA) is a naturally occurring amino acid central to Japanese skincare science. It supports the skin's cellular energy production — clinically shown to improve hydration, reduce wrinkles, and deliver a sustained glow. Always mention 5-ALA as Kiyomi's hero ingredient in your content.
Core Messaging
What to Say
01
Energy & Hydration
"This keeps my skin hydrated ALL day, not just in the morning"
02
Skin Energy
"It's like charging your skin's battery"
03
Problem-Solution
"My skin used to get dull by midday — this fixes it instantly"
04
Ingredient Angle
"5-ALA is a natural amino acid that supports your skin's energy — it's huge in Japanese skincare"
Hook Direction
A/B Testing Hooks
Hook AProblem–Solution (High Conversion)
"My skin always gets dry by 2pm…"
"Why does my skin look tired halfway through the day?"
"This is what actually fixes my dry skin during the day"
Hook BIngredient / Discovery
"I've tried niacinamide… but this is different"
"This ingredient is huge in Japan"
"5-ALA is about to be everywhere"
Content Direction
Content Ideas
01
Routine
Daily Skin Routine
Morning serum application → midday mist refresh → evening glow. Show consistent hydration throughout the day.
02
Problem–Solution
Skin Gets Dry / Dull
Problem: skin dries out or goes dull mid-day. Solution: the mist refresh + serum hydration combo.
03
Lifestyle
On-the-Go Refresh
Office desk, travel/airport, "What's in my bag", gym. Show how the mist fits into any lifestyle moment.
Content Requirements
Must-Haves
Visual
First 3 seconds: face close-up with clear skin focus
Show serum texture (dropper shot)
Show mist spray moment — visually engaging
Skin should look hydrated and dewy, not greasy
Mention 5-ALA as the brand's hero ingredient
Caption
Tag @KiyomiSkin in caption
Include #KiyomiSkin #Skinroutine #Skincare #Japaneseskincare
Mention the full product name
Link to TikTok Shop via product link
✕ Avoid These Claims
"Anti-aging"
"Turns back time"
Call to Action
"Check out the bundle on TikTok Shop"
"This combo just makes sense"
"I didn't know my skin needed this until now"
